snippet.title: "Keir Starmer Wonderin' How" - Marsh Family parody of "The Farmer and the Cowman" from Oklahoma
snippet.description:
This one was a quick turnaround ... but events have been unfolding fast this week in the wake of the Labour disaster in the elections across the United Kingdom, which has led to a major rebellion and a likely challenge to Keir Starmer's faltering leadership of the Party.

We've been hanging on - like Starmer - but in our case to a song from Oklahoma! that rhymes with his name ... the upbeat chirpy factional dance number, "The Farmer and the Cowman" which was composed by Rodgers and Hammerstein in 1943. We ducked the elaborate dance sequence but tried to add a bit of humour with the adaptation and timings. 

There are a number of fairly niche references to trace - some of them to the football (soccer) team that Starmer supports, Arsenal FC who have been very successful this season with a rather dogged resilient style built around defence. Others to the history of the Labour Party and some of the current crop of possible leadership contenders - for which you can find details below: 

- https://www.bbc.co.uk/news/articles/cvgzv4eqdrno

___________________________ 

Order our new album "Hollow Chapters" (came out 27 March): 
DIGITAL: https://orcd.co/hollowchapters 
PHYSICAL: CDs or LPs: https://themarshfamily.bandcamp.com/album/hollow-chapters

- https://open.spotify.com/artist/6AYmbCwi92V29y69lkRkRa 

___________________________ 

LYRICS
Keir Starmer’s wonderin’ how to make amends
Oh, Keir Starmer’s wonderin’ how to make amends
Wants to fight the nation’s doubt
Another try to set things out
It’s silly season all over again

Anti-Tory votes didn’t last forever
Anti-Tory votes were all eggshells
One last chance now in Labour’s quarter
Starmer’s stance isn’t boding well 

[REPEAT]

I’d like to say a word for Keir Starmer … 
[awkward silence]
I’d like to say a word for Keir Starmer
He done his best when lots requ-ired mending
He didn’t rest from making lots of changes
Just none of them were ones he was intending!

Keir Starmer is a good and gritty Englishman
No matter that his manner kind of stinks
He won’t lie under oath, always sees a path to growth 
The rest of us just end up seeing shrinks!

Keir Starmer’s wonderin’ how he should defend
Oh, Keir Starmer’s wonderin’ how he should defend 
Gunners fans love ‘minutes plus’, V.A.R. and ‘park the bus’
But that don’t help a scoreline of nil-ten!

Errors unprovoked he made as leader
Enemies he stoked who took his falls
Led a merry dance by the right-wing media
Starmer’s answers were all stonewalls

We might soon hear some words from the new boy
Wes Streeting’s face is critical and stony
He holds the starter’s gun 
Just don’t mention Mandelson!
Or the fact he might be labelled “Poor Man’s Tony”!

Keir Starmer’s not reproachable as a playboy
But did row round and round in choppy waters
He might have stopped some boats, but was haemorrhaging votes
Seems a British leader’s lifespan’s getting shorter!

Now Labour’s wonderin’ how this nightmare ends
Is it Rayner, Burnham, Milliband again …


Markets twitchy, sensing doubt, make it quick or long drawn out?
Rachel Reeves is trying to rally friends

And while the media’s feasting we’re all payin’
Our politics a farce of jungle kings
The stage used to be calm – now it’s panic and alarm
When there’s actual fascists waiting in the wings!

The stage used to be calm – now it’s panic and alarm
When there’s actual fascists waiting in the wings!

How are we supposed to stick together
With politicos who make such mess
Starmer’s toast but you wonder whether
Anyone can win with a modern press!


___________________________ 

THANKS SO MUCH TO PATREONS (HOWLERS below):

Jeremy Sedgley,  
John Hanger,  
Stephen Shuttleworth,  
Sacramento Scott,  
Christian Schranz,  
Peter Green,

Ed Rocheck,  
Wolfgang Tampier,  
Dan McColm,  
Douglas Lind,  
David Ryan,  
Simon Haslam,  
Lew,  
Mike Smith,  
Andy Riches,  
Cliff Hope,  
Carol Leff,  
Geeta & Karen (Alyssa Sangeeta Jacobson Memorial), 
David Patrao, 
Grandad

snippet.title: Wildwood – Official Teaser Trailer
snippet.description:
There are places you don’t go.
 
One choice changes everything. Watch the Teaser Trailer for Wildwood now, and see the movie in theatres everywhere October 23.

From the makers of Coraline, Wildwood is a sweeping, darkly magical adventure about a young girl who ventures into a dangerous hidden forest to rescue her brother – an odyssey shaped by love, power, and the courage to confront the unknown. 
 
Sign up to be first in line for tickets and new experiences at https://wildwoodmovie.com.

From director Travis Knight, Wildwood is based on the bestselling novel by Colin Meloy and illustrated by Carson Ellis.

#Wildwood #LAIKAstudios #StopMotion #Animation #TravisKnight #ColinMeloy #CarsonEllis #FantasyFilm #HandcraftedAnimation

Lyrics to “london”:
There's only one place I wanna lay my head
There’s only one street that I’ll never forget
There’s only one name, I know better than myself
I’m coming back to you

There’s only Sundays, hearing Ruby barking
Through the big flames almost set fire to the garden
Still a dark spot, right there where my heart is
Coming back to you
London

Oh, oh, oh, oh oh
Oh, oh, oh, oh oh
Oh, oh, oh, oh oh

I’d rather stand there, dripping in the rain
Out the window the colors on the leaves have changed
But I can feel you, running through my veins
I’m coming back to you

Sipping coffee, at that cafe that we crave
Singing off-key, we have Gracie on replay
Because you know me, like we never turn the page
I’m coming back to you
London

Oh, oh, oh, oh oh
Oh, oh, oh, oh oh
Oh, oh, oh, oh oh

In October, the windmill to the left
We’ll go over, Olivia confessed
That I was missed here, I’m hopping on a jet
And coming back to you

I'll take the fast train, right up to the door
It feels more peaceful than it ever did before
When the leaves change, I’ll be on a different shore
And coming back to you
London

Oh, oh, oh, oh oh
I’m coming back, I’m coming back
Oh, oh, oh, oh oh
I’m coming back to you
Oh, oh, oh, oh oh

snippet.title: Roblox But EVERY Second My DRAGON Evolves..
snippet.description:
Today I played Roblox but my dragon evolves! Make sure you watch the whole video to find out what happens.

Merch: https://foltyn.shop/

Join this channel to get access to perks:
https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCRkuUgtDAL4XSU5jB40J_wA/join

--Socials--

Discord: https://discord.gg/hqwZhrkqRr

Roblox Group: https://www.roblox.com/groups/11775558/Foltyns-Family#!/about

Roblox Name: TheRealFoltyn

Insta: https://www.instagram.com/realfoltyn/

Twitter: https://twitter.com/Foltynnn

What is Roblox? ROBLOX is an online virtual playground and workshop, where kids of all ages can safely interact, create, have fun, and learn. It’s unique in that practically everything on ROBLOX is designed and constructed by members of the community. ROBLOX is designed for 13 to 18 year olds, but it is open to people of all ages. Each player starts by choosing an avatar and giving it an identity. They can then explore ROBLOX — interacting with others by chatting, playing games, or collaborating on creative projects. Each player is also given their own piece of undeveloped real estate along with a virtual toolbox with which to design and build anything — be it a navigable skyscraper, a working helicopter, a giant pinball machine, a multiplayer “Capture the Flag” game or some other, yet-to-be-dreamed-up creation. There is no cost for this first plot of virtual land. By participating and by building cool stuff, ROBLOX members can earn specialty badges as well as ROBLOX dollars (“Robux”). In turn, they can shop the online catalog to purchase avatar clothing and accessories as well as premium building materials, interactive components, and working mechanisms.

#Roblox #foltyn

snippet.title: [Official Trailer] หมาเห่าเครื่องบิน A Dog and A Plane
snippet.description:
ชีวิตของ คณิต (นิว ฐิติภูมิ) สจ๊วตหนุ่มสุด Perfect ต้องมาเจอกับ โตโต้ (เต ตะวัน) หัวหน้าหน่วยกู้ภัยจอมกวนประสาทที่ใช้ชีวิตต่างกับคณิตแบบสุดขั้ว แล้วดันมีเรื่องให้ทั้งสองต้องเจอกันซ้ำแล้วซ้ำเล่า จากเรื่องเล็กๆ ที่แค่สลับกระเป๋าเดินทางกัน จนกลายเป็นเรื่องใหญ่ที่โตโต้ต้องมาช่วยคณิตจับชู้ของ ไลออน (โอบ โอบนิธิ) กัปตันหนุ่มหล่อพร้อมตำแหน่งแฟนของคณิต เรื่องราวความวุ่นวายของภารกิจจับชู้ที่จะเปลี่ยนหน้าที่กู้ภัยเป็นการกู้ใจกันเองจะเป็นอย่างไร ติดตามได้ใน “หมาเห่าเครื่องบิน A Dog And A Plane” ทุกวันศุกร์ เวลา 20:30 น. ทางช่อง ONE31 และทางแอปพลิเคชั่น TrueVisions NOW เท่านั้น เริ่ม 29 พฤษภาคมนี้

กำกับซีรีส์ : ทิชากร ภูเขาทอง 
รายชื่อนักแสดงเต ตะวัน วิหครัตน์  รับบท  โตโต้
นิว ฐิติภูมิ เตชะอภัยคุณ  รับบท  คณิต
ม่อน ธนัชชัย วิจิตรวงศ์ทอง  รับบท  อัคคี
ริว พุติพัฒน์ พุทโธนะโมชัย  รับบท  เวหา
กระปุก พลอยนิรา หิรัญทวีศิลป์  รับบท  ไพลิน
ตุ้ย ชยธร ไตรรัตนประดิษฐ์  รับบท  เบียร์
โอม ฐิภากร ฐิตะฐาน  รับบท  ป๋อ
จูโน่ ตีระณัฐ กิตติสัทโธ  รับบท  จ๊ะโอ
อาร์ติสท์ ศรีสิรินทร์ วิชยสุทธิ์  รับบท  ต้นหลิว
โอบ โอบนิธิ วิวรรธนวรางค์  รับบท  ไลออน
ป๋อมแป๋ม นิติ ชัยชิตาทร  รับบท  เจ๊โซ่

snippet.title: Deep Rock Galactic: Rogue Core - Narrated Trailer
snippet.description:
Get ready for the official Narrated Trailer for Deep Rock Galactic: Rogue Core.

Wishlist now on Steam:  https://store.steampowered.com/app/2605790/Deep_Rock_Galactic_Rogue_Core/?utm_source=youtube&utm_medium=description&utm_campaign=ea_narrated_trailer

DEEP ROCK GALACTIC: ROGUE CORE is a 1-4 player co-op FPS action roguelike featuring sci-fi dwarves, alien horrors and procedurally-generated caves. Join the elite dwarven Reclaimers and fight through perilous mining facilities infested with deadly Core Spawn. For Rock and Stone!

Think you’ve got what it takes to brave the depths?

Developed by Ghost Ship Games
Published by Ghost Ship Publishing

About the game
--------------------
DEEP ROCK GALACTIC: ROGUE CORE is a spinoff of Deep Rock Galactic with a roguelite twist.  

The roguelite twist means you start from basics in each mission and cooperatively build up powers and abilities for the team, sometimes leading to insanely overpowered builds and other times to spectacular fails

Expenite - a new mineral of incredible value and use has been discovered on planet Hoxxes! Space mining company Deep Rock Galactic immediately sets up covert mining operations deeper than ever, to harvest this precious material. Suddenly and without warning - all the dig sites go dark, and all contact is abruptly lost.

In this action-packed 1-4 player co-op roguelite, take on the role of a team of elite dwarven Reclaimers called to planet Hoxxes IV to deal with the situation. Bring the lost dig sites back online, unravel the mystery of The Greyout, and keep it from happening again using all the guts, guns, and grit at your disposal.

The Core has gone Rogue. DRG needs your help! 
--------------------
Open development happens here
Discord:  https://www.discord.gg/drg

snippet.title: GTA 6 Trailer 3: Where is it? And what's next? - GTA VI O'clock - Episode 123
snippet.description:
On this week’s GTA VI O’clock, James Jarvis and Dan Dawkins dive deep into the feverish speculation surrounding the next big reveal from Rockstar Games. While the team originally postponed recording in hopes of a "shadow drop" trailer, they instead break down why May is becoming the most critical month in the GTA 6 marketing calendar, the "six-month window" theory, historical patterns involving Rockstar's investor calls, technical rumors surrounding the PS5 Pro, wild community theories including planetary cycles, and a "left-field" rumor regarding a custom music mode that could change how we interact with the sounds of Vice City.

00:00 – The "Trailer 3" waiting game
01:17 – Happy Birthday Dan! Rockstar’s potential "gift" and investor call timing
02:34 – Why everyone thought May 12th was the day
03:45 – The 6-month marketing cycle: Analyzing historical patterns from Red Dead Redemption 2
05:00 – Background activity: PSN Store IDs, SKUs, and wishlisting clues
06:45 – The Game Informer "Redacted" cover theory
07:45 – Predicting May 19th: Why next Tuesday is the new high-probability date
09:30 – Planetary cycles and "out-there" community theories
11:15 – The logistics of a trailer drop: Why Tuesdays work best for Rockstar's offices.
13:45 – Investor Call Sidebar: What "Financial Year Guidance" tells us about the release date
15:45 – The Summer Game Fest factor: Avoiding the "jamboree" of June events
18:15 – Proposed "National Day of Silence" to force Rockstar's hand
21:00 – PS5 vs. PS5 Pro community email
24:00 – Rumor Mill: Will the PS5 Pro be the only way to play at 60 FPS?
24:45 – Custom Music Mode: Rumors of an in-game "Rockstar Radio" creation tool.
30:15 – How to join the GTA VI o'clock community.

snippet.title: Honest Trailers | A Knight's Tale
snippet.description:
It’s been 25 years since Heath Ledger blessed us with the medieval times of our lives in 2001’s A Knight’s Tale! Our Honest Trailer looks back at the 4th film that year to mix modern and medieval, in a pop culture slurry that against all odds came out delicious.  

Voice Narration: Jon Bailey the EPIC VOICE GUY (@epicvoiceguy on all socials)
Title Design: Robert Holtby
Written by: Spencer Gilbert and Lon Harris
Produced by: Spencer Gilbert
Edited by: Kevin Williamsen
Post-Production Manager: Emin Bassavand
Manager, Video Operations: Tiffany Tse
Post-Production Specialist: Rebecca Castaneda
VP Content: Max Dionne
